name: list_calendars
description: List the calendars on the operator's Google account (the calendar list). Returns each calendar's id (use it as calendar_id with the other calendar tools), summary (name), whether it is the primary calendar, and the operator's accessRole.

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON array of calendar objects {id, summary, primary, accessRole} (or an error string).
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator. Use this to discover a calendar's id, then pass that id as calendar_id to create_event / list_events / update_event / delete_event. The calendar with primary=true is the default 'primary' calendar.
